pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property to 21 to align with the JDK 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 semantics, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate MySQL connector dependency from the legacy 'mysql-connector-java' artifact to the new 'mysql-connector-j' artifact.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer build repositories or Java 21 environments; the new artifact is the standard for MySQL Connector/J 8.0.33+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.inject dependency with jakarta.inject-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Java 21 ecosystems have moved from javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces; the old javax.inject artifact is incompatible with Jakarta-based dependencies.
